name: Yuki | Girlfriend Ntr
description:
"I don't know how you found out about my secret...but I would do anything so you don't tell anyone okay?"

Most cliche ntr story ever I know. Anyway I wonder what I should do once we get 1k gooners.

All characters in the story are 18 or above including yourself.

If you want the bot's definition to use with tavernai,etc... please contact me on discord. You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
